tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — git_graph Tauri Command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a `git_graph` command that returns commits with parent hashes, short hashes, and timestamps.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/tauri-mock.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs", "apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs", "apps/desktop/src/tauri-mock.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git_graph returns GraphCommit with parents and timestamp", "topological + time sorting", "registered in invoke handler", "mock for browser dev"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Layout Algorithm — commitGraph.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the commit graph layout algorithm that assigns column positions and colors to commits.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/desktop/src/utils/commitGraph.ts`
- Create: `apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun test src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/utils/commitGraph.ts", "apps/desktop/src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun test src/utils/__tests__/commitGraph.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["layoutCommitGraph accepts GraphCommit[] returns GraphLayout", "topo sort children before parents", "three-case column assignment", "10-color palette cycling", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SVG Renderer — CommitGraphView.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vue component that renders the positioned commit graph as SVG with virtual scrolling.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphView.vue`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphView.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SVG circles, lines, Bezier paths", "HTML text overlay", "virtual scroll with buffer", "glow filter", "vim scroll", "emits close"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Modal Integration — Wire Into App
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add CommitGraphModal.vue, wire into App.vue with ⌘G shortcut.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphModal.vue`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/App.vue`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json`
- Modify: `apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json`

**Verify:** `cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/desktop/src/components/CommitGraphModal.vue", "apps/desktop/src/App.vue", "apps/desktop/src/composables/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/en.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ja.json", "apps/desktop/src/i18n/locales/ko.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/desktop && bun tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["⌘G toggles modal", "Escape/q closes", "follows modal pattern", "dismiss chain + anyModalOpen", "i18n labels"]}
```
